Subject: Hi!
Message:
Hi Geoff,

I'm really sorry to hear about your father.  I hope that everything is
getting better now after all that terrible thing.  I'll pray for him too.

I'm glad to hear that you already have a daughter.  My youngest son is
slightly older than your daughter.  He is eight-month old.

I'm still doing commodity trading like before, rice, tapioca and yellow
maize.  Now we are also investing on Corn Oil project.

Well, just keep in touch Geoff,  write to me when you have time.

Harry
----- Original Message -----
From: Storey, Geoff <Geoff.Storey@ENRON.com>
To: Hariyono Tan <hariyont@indosat.net.id>
Sent: Tuesday, September 25, 2001 12:37 AM
Subject: RE: Hi!


Hey Harry,

Great to hear from you. I'm alright but in am sorry to say my father was
on the 99th floor of the north tower when the first plane hit. He was
unfortunately one of many that didn't make it out. So the last few weeks
have been difficult. He had funeral services for him on Saturday. Sorry
to drop such terrible news on you.

Yes i am married now and i have a 5 month old baby, Cameron James
Storey. Things were going great before Tuesday. i am woring at Enron as
a natural gas trader and love my job.

let me know what you are doing these days.

geof

-----Original Message-----
From: Hariyono Tan [mailto:hariyont@indosat.net.id]
Sent: Wednesday, September 12, 2001 11:01 AM
To: Geoff Storey
Subject: Hi!


Hi Geoff,

How are you doing?  I's been awhile since the last time I wrote.  I'm
just
worried about all my friends in the States after the attack of WTC.  I
just
want to make sure that you are find.

The last time you wrote to me you're engaged already.  Are you married
now,
or maybe you have kids already.

Write me back, ok.
